title: Overview
text:
Overview





















GPS Tracking Data by Elephant

title: Wildlife - Elephant
text:
m <- leaflet() %>%
  addProviderTiles(
    providers$OpenStreetMap,
    group = "Street Map"
  ) %>%
  addProviderTiles(
    providers$Esri.WorldImagery,
    group = "Satellite"
  )



elephants <- sort(unique(df_sf$name))

for(e in elephants){

  dat <- df_sf %>%
    filter(name == e) %>%
    arrange(datetime)

  line_dat <- lines_sf %>%
    filter(name == e)

  m <- m %>%
    addCircleMarkers(
      data = dat,
      group = e,
      color = ~pal(year_month),
      radius = 4,
      stroke = FALSE,
      fillOpacity = 1,
      popup = ~paste(
        "<b>Elephant:</b>", name,
        "<br><b>Date:</b>", datetime,
        "<br><b>Year-Month:</b>", year_month
      )
    )
}


m <- m %>%
  addLayersControl(
    overlayGroups = elephants,
    baseGroups = c("Street Map", "Satellite"),
    options = layersControlOptions(
      collapsed = FALSE
    )
  )


m <- m %>%
  addLegend(
    pal = pal,
    values = df_sf$year_month,
    title = "Year-Month",
    position = "bottomright"
  )

m

m <- leaflet() %>%
  addProviderTiles(
    providers$OpenStreetMap,
    group = "Street Map"
  ) %>%
  addProviderTiles(
    providers$Esri.WorldImagery,
    group = "Satellite"
  )



elephants <- sort(unique(df_sf$name))

for(e in elephants){

  dat <- df_sf %>%
    filter(name == e) %>%
    arrange(datetime)

  line_dat <- lines_sf %>%
    filter(name == e)

  m <- m %>%
    addPolylines(
      data = line_dat,
      group = e,
      color = "black",
      weight = 2,
      opacity = 0.6
    ) %>%
    addCircleMarkers(
      data = dat,
      group = e,
      color = ~pal(year_month),
      radius = 4,
      stroke = FALSE,
      fillOpacity = 0.8,
      popup = ~paste(
        "<b>Elephant:</b>", name,
        "<br><b>Date:</b>", datetime,
        "<br><b>Year-Month:</b>", year_month
      )
    )
}



m <- m %>%
  addLayersControl(
    overlayGroups = elephants,
    baseGroups = c("Street Map", "Satellite"),
    options = layersControlOptions(
      collapsed = FALSE
    )
  )


m <- m %>%
  addLegend(
    pal = pal,
    values = df_sf$year_month,
    title = "Year-Month",
    position = "bottomright"
  )

m
